flags.summary: First-year retention at South University-Savannah fell 61% between 2021 and 2024 (57.1% → 22.2%).

flags.summary: 150%-time completion at South University-Savannah fell 23% between 2006 and 2009 (40.0% → 30.6%).

flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at South University-Savannah fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.1% → 0.0%).
